groups.canvas_glue:
function canvas2d_imports(target) {
  const ctx = (target && target.getContext) ? target.getContext('2d') : target;
  const S = { grads: [], buf: '', dash: [], img: null, imgW: 0, imgH: 0, imgI: 0,
              fonts: ['"TeX Gyre Heros Makie", sans-serif', '"DejaVu Sans", sans-serif', 'monospace'],
              font: { fam: 0, size: 10, weight: 400, italic: 0 } };
  const setFont = () => { ctx.font = (S.font.italic ? 'italic ' : '') + S.font.weight + ' ' + S.font.size + 'px ' + S.fonts[S.font.fam]; };
  return {
    begin_path: () => { ctx.beginPath(); return 0n; },
    close_path: () => { ctx.closePath(); return 0n; },
    move_to: (x, y) => { ctx.moveTo(x, y); return 0n; },
    line_to: (x, y) => { ctx.lineTo(x, y); return 0n; },
    bezier_curve_to: (c1x, c1y, c2x, c2y, x, y) => { ctx.bezierCurveTo(c1x, c1y, c2x, c2y, x, y); return 0n; },
    quadratic_curve_to: (cx, cy, x, y) => { ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, cy, x, y); return 0n; },
    arc: (x, y, r, sa, ea, ccw) => { ctx.arc(x, y, r, sa, ea, ccw !== 0n); return 0n; },
    ellipse: (x, y, rx, ry, rot, sa, ea, ccw) => { ctx.ellipse(x, y, rx, ry, rot, sa, ea, ccw !== 0n); return 0n; },
    rect: (x, y, w, h) => { ctx.rect(x, y, w, h); return 0n; },
    fill_nonzero: () => { ctx.fill('nonzero'); return 0n; },
    fill_evenodd: () => { ctx.fill('evenodd'); return 0n; },
    stroke: () => { ctx.stroke(); return 0n; },
    fill_rect: (x, y, w, h) => { ctx.fillRect(x, y, w, h); return 0n; },
    stroke_rect: (x, y, w, h) => { ctx.strokeRect(x, y, w, h); return 0n; },
    clear_rect: (x, y, w, h) => { ctx.clearRect(x, y, w, h); return 0n; },
    clip_nonzero: () => { ctx.clip('nonzero'); return 0n; },
    clip_evenodd: () => { ctx.clip('evenodd'); return 0n; },
    set_fill_rgba: (r, g, b, a) => { ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + a + ')'; return 0n; },
    set_stroke_rgba: (r, g, b, a) => { ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + a + ')'; return 0n; },
    set_line_width: (w) => { ctx.lineWidth = w; return 0n; },
    set_line_cap: (k) => { ctx.lineCap = ['butt', 'round', 'square'][Number(k)]; return 0n; },
    set_line_join: (k) => { ctx.lineJoin = ['miter', 'round', 'bevel'][Number(k)]; return 0n; },
    set_miter_limit: (m) => { ctx.miterLimit = m; return 0n; },
    set_global_alpha: (a) => { ctx.globalAlpha = a; return 0n; },
    set_line_dash4: (d1, d2, d3, d4, n) => { ctx.setLineDash([d1, d2, d3, d4].slice(0, Number(n))); return 0n; },
    set_line_dash_offset: (o) => { ctx.lineDashOffset = o; return 0n; },
    dash_buf_clear: () => { S.dash = []; return 0n; },
    dash_buf_push: (d) => { S.dash.push(d); return 0n; },
    set_line_dash_buf: () => { ctx.setLineDash(S.dash); return 0n; },
    save: () => { ctx.save(); return 0n; },
    restore: () => { ctx.restore(); return 0n; },
    translate: (x, y) => { ctx.translate(x, y); return 0n; },
    scale_xy: (x, y) => { ctx.scale(x, y); return 0n; },
    rotate: (a) => { ctx.rotate(a); return 0n; },
    transform: (a, b, c, d, e, f) => { ctx.transform(a, b, c, d, e, f); return 0n; },
    set_transform: (a, b, c, d, e, f) => { ctx.setTransform(a, b, c, d, e, f); return 0n; },
    reset_transform: () => { ctx.resetTransform(); return 0n; },
    gradient_linear_new: (x0, y0, x1, y1) => { S.grads.push(ctx.createLinearGradient(x0, y0, x1, y1)); return BigInt(S.grads.length - 1); },
    gradient_add_stop: (id, off, r, g, b, a) => { S.grads[Number(id)].addColorStop(off, 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + a + ')'); return 0n; },
    set_fill_gradient: (id) => { ctx.fillStyle = S.grads[Number(id)]; return 0n; },
    set_stroke_gradient: (id) => { ctx.strokeStyle = S.grads[Number(id)]; return 0n; },
    gradient_clear_all: () => { S.grads.length = 0; return 0n; },
    set_font: (fam, size, weight, italic) => { S.font = { fam: Number(fam), size: size, weight: Number(weight), italic: Number(italic) }; setFont(); return 0n; },
    set_text_align: (k) => { ctx.textAlign = ['left', 'center', 'right'][Number(k)]; return 0n; },
    set_text_baseline: (k) => { ctx.textBaseline = ['alphabetic', 'top', 'middle', 'bottom'][Number(k)]; return 0n; },
    text_buf_clear: () => { S.buf = ''; return 0n; },
    text_buf_push: (cp) => { S.buf += String.fromCodePoint(Number(cp)); return 0n; },
    fill_text_buf: (x, y) => { ctx.fillText(S.buf, x, y); return 0n; },
    fill_text_char: (cp, x, y) => { ctx.fillText(String.fromCodePoint(Number(cp)), x, y); return 0n; },
    measure_text_buf_width: () => ctx.measureText(S.buf).width,
    measure_text_buf_ascent: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.actualBoundingBoxAscent ?? 0; },
    measure_text_buf_descent: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.actualBoundingBoxDescent ?? 0; },
    measure_text_buf_left: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.actualBoundingBoxLeft ?? 0; },
    measure_text_buf_right: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.actualBoundingBoxRight ?? 0; },
    measure_text_buf_font_ascent: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.fontBoundingBoxAscent ?? m.actualBoundingBoxAscent ?? 0; },
    measure_text_buf_font_descent: () => { const m = ctx.measureText(S.buf); return m.fontBoundingBoxDescent ?? m.actualBoundingBoxDescent ?? 0; },
    img_buf_new: (w, h) => { S.imgW = Number(w); S.imgH = Number(h); S.img = new Uint8ClampedArray(S.imgW * S.imgH * 4); S.imgI = 0; return 0n; },
    img_buf_push_rgba: (r, g, b, a) => { S.img[S.imgI++] = Number(r); S.img[S.imgI++] = Number(g); S.img[S.imgI++] = Number(b); S.img[S.imgI++] = Number(a); return 0n; },
    put_image_buf: (x, y) => { ctx.putImageData(new ImageData(S.img, S.imgW, S.imgH), x, y); return 0n; },
    draw_image_buf: (x, y, w, h) => { let img = S.img, iw = S.imgW, ih = S.imgH; if (!ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled) { const m = ctx.getTransform(); const dw = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(w) * Math.hypot(m.a, m.b))), dh = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(h) * Math.hypot(m.c, m.d))); if (dw !== iw || dh !== ih) { const out = new Uint8ClampedArray(dw * dh * 4); for (let j = 0; j < dh; j++) { const sj = Math.min(ih - 1, Math.floor((j + 0.5) * ih / dh)); for (let i = 0; i < dw; i++) { const si = Math.min(iw - 1, Math.floor((i + 0.5) * iw / dw)); const o = (j * dw + i) * 4, s = (sj * iw + si) * 4; out[o] = img[s]; out[o+1] = img[s+1]; out[o+2] = img[s+2]; out[o+3] = img[s+3]; } } img = out; iw = dw; ih = dh; } } const oc = new OffscreenCanvas(iw, ih); oc.getContext('2d').putImageData(new ImageData(img, iw, ih), 0, 0); ctx.drawImage(oc, x, y, w, h); return 0n; },
    set_image_smoothing: (on) => { ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = on !== 0n; return 0n; },
    set_global_composite: (k) => { ctx.globalCompositeOperation = ['source-over', 'lighter', 'multiply', 'copy'][Number(k)]; return 0n; },
    width: () => ctx.canvas ? ctx.canvas.width : 0,
    height: () => ctx.canvas ? ctx.canvas.height : 0,
    device_pixel_ratio: () => (typeof devicePixelRatio !== 'undefined') ? devicePixelRatio : 1
  };
}
async function canvas2d_load_fonts(faces) {
  if (typeof document === 'undefined' || !document.fonts) return false;
  // allSettled + per-face try: a strict font sanitizer (Firefox warns and
  // can reject DejaVu glyf bboxes) must NEVER block drawing — text falls
  // back to the next family in the stack instead
  await Promise.allSettled(faces.map(f => {
    try {
      return new FontFace(f.family, 'url(' + f.url + ')',
                          { weight: String(f.weight), style: f.style })
        .load().then(face => { document.fonts.add(face); });
    } catch (e) { return Promise.resolve(); }
  }));
  return true;
}
